spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses the containertiming attribute, observes PerformanceObserver entry type "container" when available, and labels simulated rows as fallback data.

interactive.rationale: Paint budget, complexity, container count, observer mode, and containertiming-ignore controls all drive the monitor output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page explains named container paint entries and budget monitoring with the same framing as the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: The forced unsupported fallback mode and ignored-subtree toggle surface failure and exclusion behavior alongside the happy path.

references.rationale: A labelled references section includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5110962817073152 link.

design_system.rationale: The page continues to use shared CSS variables, readable text/background pairs, and explicit button foreground colors.

summary: The major missing-reference finding is resolved, and the monitor now maps directly to the Container Timing API with explicit native and fallback paths.
